current_phase: TEST environment stabilization and SMS flow validation
current_focus: LT Proteros sandbox SMS test flows — building and validating TEST workflows for the missed call → SMS → AI → booking pipeline

stages.name: Foundation & Operating Model
stages.description: Repo scaffolding, CI/CD pipeline, B-Lite operating model, project brain documentation, CLAUDE.md execution rules, AI contributor guardrails.
stages.completion_criteria: Repo structure, CI pipeline, B-Lite operating model, project brain, CLAUDE.md rules — all in place and enforced.

stages.name: TEST Sandbox Workflow Chain
stages.description: Chain of n8n TEST workflows (wf001–wf006) that simulate the full missed call → SMS → AI → booking flow in the LT Proteros sandbox environment.
stages.completion_criteria: All TEST workflow JSONs (wf001–wf006) committed, importable into n8n, and executing successfully in sandbox environment with test credentials.

stages.name: Core Messaging & AI Flow
stages.description: Twilio webhook ingress, BullMQ queuing, n8n worker processing, OpenAI conversation, booking intent detection, and SMS reply.
stages.completion_criteria: Missed call triggers SMS, inbound SMS processed, AI generates reply, booking intent detected, appointment created. Verified end-to-end with real Twilio number.

stages.name: Calendar & Booking Reliability
stages.description: Google Calendar OAuth integration, appointment sync, confirmation SMS, and failure surfacing.
stages.completion_criteria: OAuth flow complete, appointment syncs to Google Calendar, confirmation SMS sent, sync failures surface clearly. Verified with real Google credentials.

stages.name: Admin Visibility & Control
stages.description: Project ops dashboard powered by project_status.json, tenant health monitoring, conversation metrics.
stages.completion_criteria: Admin dashboard shows project status, tenant health, conversation metrics, and blocker visibility. Dashboard JSON data source created.

stages.name: Production Readiness
stages.description: Stripe billing, idempotency verification, error handling hardening, and environment configuration for real deployment.
stages.completion_criteria: Billing (Stripe checkout, webhooks, trial limits, plan enforcement) live-tested. Idempotency verified. Error handling covers all failure modes.

stages.name: First Live Pilot
stages.description: One real Texas auto repair shop fully onboarded with real phone number, missed calls, AI conversations, and Google Calendar sync.
stages.completion_criteria: One real Texas auto shop receiving missed-call SMS, AI replies working, bookings appearing in Google Calendar.

stages.name: Scale & Handoff
stages.description: Multi-tenant onboarding automation, monitoring dashboards, operational documentation, and handoff readiness.
stages.completion_criteria: Multi-tenant onboarding flow, monitoring, documentation for handoff to non-AI operator.
